mapper.sql: id, resource_id, user_code, sandbox_type, endpoint, chat_id, status, auto_release, last_access_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ss_sandbox_record ( resource_id, user_code, sandbox_type, endpoint, chat_id, status, auto_release, last_access_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sandboxType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chatId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{autoRelease,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastAccessTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET status = 'RELEASED', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND auto_release = 1 AND last_access_time IS NOT NULL
AND last_access_time < (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - #{timeoutMinutes} * INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ss_sandbox_record WHERE status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_sandbox_record SET auto_release = #{autoRelease,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
